criteria.check: User / team / module rules live in distinct files
criteria.fail_if: any rule sits in the wrong scope or is duplicated across levels

criteria.check: Root prefix is stable: no per-turn values, no subtree-only rules
criteria.fail_if: a timestamp/branch value or module-only rule appears in the root

criteria.check: Path-scoped rules use recursive globs (**), not (*)
criteria.fail_if: a glob omits ** while its subtree has subfolders

criteria.check: Subpath precedence documented; most specific wins; explicit tie-breaks
criteria.fail_if: two overlapping globs have no documented tie-break

criteria.check: Personal preferences are in user scope, never the team repo
criteria.fail_if: a personal preference is versioned in the team CLAUDE.md

criteria.check: @import graph is a DAG with no broken or circular imports
criteria.fail_if: a cycle exists or an import path is missing and degrades silently

criteria.check: Existing manual module edits preserved, not overwritten
criteria.fail_if: a write clobbers a team's existing manual edit block

criteria.check: scripts/check.sh passes functionally, not just exit-zero
criteria.fail_if: green is reported without functional check output
